notes: Authentic 9-column ANZ goMoney/internet-banking CSV export layout (Type,Details,Particulars,Code,Reference,Amount,Date,ForeignCurrencyAmount,ConversionCharge). Everyday/cheque account. Synthetic rows (Acme Inc; Payroll Ltd; Water Services; masked Visa debit 1234-****-****-4321; Atm Debit). Rows extracted verbatim from open-source parser test data (AnzChequeCsvTestData.TestData1).

Authentic 9-column ANZ CSV export layout with characteristic EFTPOS card mask (4835********) and '5083   C' code field. Synthetic transactions (Seasons Markets EFTPOS; W&I Benefit deposit; Rent Fee automatic payment). Reference column shows an Excel scientific-notation artifact. Public budgeting-app sample folder (same repo as ASB export_03).

Authentic ANZ Visa credit-card CSV export layout (Card,Type,Amount,Details,TransactionDate,ProcessedDate,ForeignCurrencyAmount,ConversionCharge). Masked card 4879-****-****-6843; D/C debit-credit indicator; generic NZ locations (Auckland Nz, Silverdale Nz, Coffee Club Sylvia). Anonymised software-vendor import test case (Banana Accounting).

ANZ Credit Card 'Card Summary' disclosure/contract (2 pages). PLACEHOLDER ONLY - no example rows: fields are tokens (<customer name>, credit limit $<amount>, <rate>% p.a., interest-free <44><55> days). No transaction table. Useful for card-summary layout, not table parsing.

ANZ KiwiSaver annotated worked-example statement, synthetic 'Mr AB Sample' (investor 010101, PIR 28%). POPULATED SUMMARY/ALLOCATION TABLES with real example values (opening $51,904.55; contributions $5,417.23 = employee $3,207.68 / employer $1,688.12 / govt $521.43; closing $61,060.94; fund allocation Balanced 0.89% $5,905.91, etc.). No dated per-line transaction ledger (summary-only).

ANZ Investment Funds/OneAnswer annotated worked-example statement, synthetic 'Mr AB Sample' (investor 010101). CONTAINS A FULLY POPULATED DATED TRANSACTION TABLE - 'Your account transactions', Balanced Fund: columns Date | Transaction | Units | Unit price | Total amount, e.g. '02/04/2025 PIE Tax -249.7457 $2.4181 -$603.91', '31/12/2025 Withdrawal -1,510.9164 $2.6474 -$4,000.00', 6x 'Investment' rows. Plus account summary + fund summary tables. Top-priority table specimen (managed-fund layout).

NOT DOWNLOADED - FLAGGED. Third-party mortgage-adviser (youm.co.nz) 'Bank Statement and IRD Summary Download Guide, May 2022' reproducing ANZ internet-banking/statement screenshots. May show a real customer account/transactions. Host also blocked by egress (403). Do not use until confirmed redacted/synthetic.

Canonical/normalised 8-column Zera Books 'Xero standard' import schema (transaction_date,description,amount,debit_credit,balance,currency,unique_id,memo) - a reconciled accounting-software import layout, NOT the bank's native online-banking export format. Fully synthetic: 8 rows incl. an opening-balance row (Payroll deposit, Office supplies/Staples inv 88321, Client wire, SaaS subscription, Merchant batch, Rent, Bank service fee); NZD; running balance; debit/credit indicator. Rows are identical across the NZ banks, differing only in the opening balance and the ANZNZ- unique_id prefix. CC BY 4.0, attribution Zera Books.
